productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men White Shirt
description: Composition White shirt made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves and double buttoned cuffs, spread collar, front buttoned placket, black and white checked detailing on the inside of the collar, cuffs and placket and a pocket on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Get casual and comfortable in style with this white shirt from united colors of benetton. The black and white checked detailing gives this shirt a stylish look, while you can roll up the sleeves to suit the occasion. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
